title: ophrys × notabilis
intro: Ophrys × notabilis is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Ophrys scutellata and Ophrys sphegodes, commonly known as bee orchids due to their unique appearance and ability to mimic female insects. The medicinal properties of Ophrys × notabilis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Ophrys × notabilis include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
